nodes.context: Mexican criminal organization formed to expel Los Zetas from Michoacán and Jalisco; involved in drug trafficking in Tierra Caliente.
Mexican criminal organization from Michoacán, originally a self-defense group, now involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and kidnapping.
Mexican criminal group formed from self-defense groups, involved in drug trafficking and extortion.
Mexican drug cartel, member of the original alliance against Los Zetas.
Mexican drug cartel, member of the original alliance against Los Zetas.
Mexican drug cartel, member of the original alliance against Los Zetas.
Mexican criminal organization, member of the original alliance against Los Zetas.
Mexican criminal organization targeted by the original alliance.
Mexican drug cartel, main rival of Cárteles Unidos in recent years.
Mexican drug cartel, originally part of La Resistencia; later incorporated into Cártel de Sinaloa.
Mexican drug cartel, fought against by La Resistencia.

nodes.standard_name: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima
nodes.original_text_name: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima
nodes.context: Mexican criminal organization, reinforced by Cárteles Unidos in its fight against CJNG.
Self-defense group turned criminal, faction of Cárteles Unidos operating in Tierra Caliente.
Mexican criminal organization listed as enemy of Cárteles Unidos in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos, conocido inicialmente como La Resistencia, es una organización criminal mexicana compuesta por miembros del Cártel de Tepalcatepec
edges.context: Cártel de Tepalcatepec is a member organization of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos, conocido inicialmente como La Resistencia, es una organización criminal mexicana compuesta por miembros del ... Los Viagras

edges.context: Cártel del Golfo is a member organization of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.context: Los Caballeros Templarios is a member organization of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: originalmente formado para expulsar a Los Zetas de los estados de Michoacán y Jalisco
edges.context: Cárteles Unidos was originally formed to expel Los Zetas from Michoacán and Jalisco.

edges.evidence_quote: Sin embargo, el rival de Cárteles Unidos en los últimos años ha sido el Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación
edges.context: Cárteles Unidos and CJNG are rivals, disputing the Tierra Caliente region.

edges.evidence_quote: Luego, el Cartel del Milenio se incorporó al Cartel de Sinaloa
edges.context: Cártel del Milenio was incorporated into Cártel de Sinaloa.

edges.target: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima
edges.evidence_quote: 200 sicarios de CU se filmaron en su arribo al municipio de Villagrán, esto para reforzar al Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima en su lucha contra el CJNG
edges.context: Cárteles Unidos reinforced Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima in its fight against CJNG.

edges.evidence_quote: Facciones que la conforman: Blancos de Troya
edges.context: Blancos de Troya is a faction of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: las disputas internas terminaron por orillarlos a aliarse con el CJNG
edges.context: Los Viagras allied with CJNG to fight Los Caballeros Templarios and Los de Tepeque.
